description: Style NoteGive your wardrobe a fashionable edge with these knit Sports shorts from jockey. The soft fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Team them with a stylish tee and sports shoes for a look that's effortless Product DetailsGrey shorts that extend till just above the knee, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring for a perfect Fit, curved yoke back, two angled back pockets and blue piping along the sides for that sporty lookNote: The colour of the logo and piping on the product may vary from that of the website image  Material and CareCotton/elastaneMachine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorations
